content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_Orders
 --drop view BI_Orders

AS

    SELECT 
        OL.ORNO AS [Order Number],
        OL.ORST AS [Line Status],
        OL.PONR AS [Line Number],
        OL.POSX AS [Line Suffix],
        OL.LNCL AS [Line Classification],
        OL.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
        OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO],
        OL.RGDT AS [Line Entry Date],
        OL.DWDZ AS [Line Requested Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OL.UID1), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OL.UID1), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OL.UID1), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Line Expected Ship Date],
        OL.SMCD AS [SalesRep],
        OL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
        OL.ORQT AS [Order Quantity],
        OL.ALQT AS [Allocated Quantity],
        OL.RNQT AS [Remaining to Allocate Quantity],
        OL.PLQT AS [In Process Quantity],
        OL.DLQT AS [Delivered Quantity],
        OL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Quantity],
        (OL.ALQT + OL.RNQT + OL.PLQT + OL.DLQT) AS [Open Quantity],
        CASE 
            WHEN (OL.ORQT - (OL.ALQT + OL.RNQT + OL.PLQT + OL.DLQT) - OL.IVQT) < 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (OL.ORQT - (OL.ALQT + OL.RNQT + OL.PLQT + OL.DLQT) - OL.IVQT)
        END AS [Cancelled Quantity],
        OL.SAPR AS [Unit Price],
        OL.UCOS AS [Unit Cost],
        OL.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
        OL.RSC6 AS [Reason Code],
        OL.TEPY AS [Payment Terms],
        OL.TEDL AS [Delivery Terms],
        OL.ADID AS [Address ID],
        OH.OBLC AS [Order Stop Code],
        CASE 
            WHEN OH.OBLC IN ('0','9') THEN 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '1' THEN 'Ship Complete'
            WHEN OH.OBLC IN ('2','3') THEN 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '6' THEN 'Time Fenced Credit Limit Issue'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' THEN 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' THEN 'Logistics Hold'
            ELSE 'NA' 
        END AS [Order Stop Code Description],
        OH.FDED AS [First Date],
        OH.LDED AS [Last Date],
        OH.RGDT AS [Order Entry Date],
        OH.RLDT AS [Requested Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OH.UID1), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OH.UID1), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), OH.UID1), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Updated Requested Date],
        OH.RESP AS [Sales Admin Responsible],
        OH.ORTP AS [Order Type],
        OH.WCON AS [Contact Method],
        OH.PYNO AS [Payer],
        COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OA2.CUNM, OC.CUNM) AS [Ship to Name],
        COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OA2.CUA1, OC.CUA1) AS [Ship to Address 1],
        COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OA2.CUA2, OC.CUA2) AS [Ship to Address 2],
        COALESCE(OA.TOWN, OA2.TOWN, OC.TOWN) AS [Ship to City],
        COALESCE(OA.ECAR, OA2.ECAR, OC.ECAR) AS [Ship to State],
        COALESCE(OA.PONO, OA2.PONO, OC.PONO) AS [Ship to Zip Code],
        COALESCE(OA.CSCD, OA2.CSCD, OC.CUA4) AS [Ship to Country]

    FROM M3.OOLINE OL
    LEFT JOIN M3.OOHEAD OH ON OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.OOADRE OA ON OL.ORNO = OA.ORNO AND OA.ADRT = '1' AND OL.ADID = OA.ADID
    LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSAD OA2 ON OL.CUNO = OA2.CUNO AND OL.ADID = OA2.ADID AND OL.ADID <> '' AND OA2.ADRT = '1'
